description: PRD Features: Duplicate Detection (FR-12) & Faculty/Study Program Filter (FR-14)

userStories.title: Add schema tables for faculties, study_programs, and M:N junctions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database tables for faculties, study_programs, bibliography_faculties, and bibliography_study_programs to support M:N relationships with ALL concept.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `faculties` table (id, name, code, createdAt, deletedAt)
Add `studyPrograms` table (id, facultyId FK, name, code, createdAt, deletedAt) with facultyId index
Add `bibliographyFaculties` junction table (id, bibliographyId FK, facultyId FK, createdAt) with unique constraint on (bibliographyId, facultyId)
Add `bibliographyStudyPrograms` junction table (id, bibliographyId FK, studyProgramId FK, createdAt) with unique constraint on (bibliographyId, studyProgramId)
Add relations for all new tables
Update bibliographyRelations to include bibliographyFaculties and bibliographyStudyPrograms
Generate and apply migration successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create faculties CRUD module with tests
userStories.description: As a super admin, I want to manage faculties so that bibliographies can be categorized by faculty.
acceptanceCriteria: Create validation schemas: createFacultySchema (name min 3), updateFacultySchema (partial)
Create faculty service: getAll, getById, create (duplicate name check), update, softDelete
Usage check before delete: reject if study_programs or bibliography_faculties reference this faculty
Create faculty controller with Zod safeParse + sendSuccess/sendError/sendValidationError
Create faculty route with GET (public), POST/PATCH/DELETE (super_admin) + JSDoc swagger
Register route in routes/index.ts
Create unit tests for faculty service covering: create success, duplicate reject, delete with usage check
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create study programs CRUD module with tests
userStories.description: As a super admin, I want to manage study programs under faculties so that bibliographies can be categorized by study program.
acceptanceCriteria: Create validation schemas: createStudyProgramSchema (name min 3, facultyId required), updateStudyProgramSchema (partial)
Create study program service: getAll (with optional facultyId filter), getById, create (duplicate name check within faculty), update, softDelete
Usage check before delete: reject if bibliography_study_programs reference this study program
Create study program controller with Zod safeParse + sendSuccess/sendError/sendValidationError
Create study program route with GET (public), POST/PATCH/DELETE (super_admin) + JSDoc swagger
Register route in routes/index.ts
Create unit tests for study program service covering: create success, duplicate reject within faculty, list with facultyId filter
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update bibliography module with faculty/prodi M:N sync and ALL-aware filter
userStories.description: As a librarian, I want to assign faculties and study programs to bibliographies and filter the catalog by them, with ALL concept support.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `facultyIds` and `studyProgramIds` arrays to createBibliographySchema and updateBibliographySchema
Add `facultyId` and `studyProgramId` query params to bibliographyQuerySchema
Update bibliography service create(): sync bibliography_faculties and bibliography_studyPrograms after insert
Update bibliography service update(): sync junction tables (delete old, insert new)
Update bibliography service getById(): include faculties and studyPrograms in response with nested faculty
Update bibliography service list(): add ALL-aware filter logic for facultyId and studyProgramId
Update bibliography service list(): include faculties and studyPrograms in response mapping
Update validation tests for new schema fields
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add duplicate detection endpoint for bibliographies
userStories.description: As a librarian creating a bibliography, I want the system to detect duplicates via ISBN exact match and title+author fuzzy match, with suggestions to redirect to existing records.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `checkDuplicate` method to bibliography service: ISBN exact match + title ILIKE match + author ILIKE via bibliography_authors JOIN
Set `hasExactMatch` flag true if any ISBN exact match found
Return combined unique results with id, title, isbnIssn, classification, callNumber, authors, similarity
Add Zod validation: at least one of isbn/title/author required
Add checkDuplicate handler to bibliography controller
Add route GET /bibliographies/check-duplicate (public, before /:id)
Create unit tests for checkDuplicate: ISBN match, title+author fuzzy match, empty result, at least one param required
Update validation tests
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add seed data for UMC faculties and study programs
userStories.description: As a developer, I want seed data for UMC faculties and study programs so that the system works out of the box.
acceptanceCriteria: Create or update seed.ts with faculties data (Fakultas Teknik, FEB, FIK, FKIP, FH, etc.)
Create or update seed.ts with study programs data linked to faculties
Seed runs successfully with npm run db:seed
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add swagger documentation for all new endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all new endpoints documented in Swagger for easy API reference.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Faculty and StudyProgram schemas to swagger.ts components.schemas
Add all faculty CRUD paths to swagger.ts paths
Add all study program CRUD paths to swagger.ts paths
Add Faculties and Study Programs tags to swagger.ts tags
Update Bibliography schema with faculties[] and studyPrograms[] fields
Add check-duplicate endpoint to swagger paths
Typecheck passes
